name.en-US: Commentary on the De Memoria et Reminiscentia
name.la: Sententia super De Memoria et Reminiscentia

description.en-US: Aquinas's commentary on Aristotle's *De Memoria et Reminiscentia* — on memory and recollection, completing the parva naturalia commentaries.
description.la: Expositio *De Memoria et Reminiscentia* Aristotelis — de memoria et reminiscentia, ad commentaria parvorum naturalium pertinens.

sources.description: English translation mirrored via the Geremia/AquinasOperaOmnia GitHub repository.
Latin Leonine / Marietti edition (public domain), mirrored from dhspriory.org via the Geremia/AquinasOperaOmnia GitHub repository.
